author: Agentage
description: Let Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client read and write your Obsidian vault. Two-way Git sync to a private memory, safe merges with    flagged conflicts, plain Markdown you own, up to 100 MB - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: agentage
manifest.description: Let Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client read and write your vault. Two-way live sync to a private memory, concurrent edits reconciled server-side, plain Markdown you own. Up to 100 MB included.
manifest.name: Agentage Sync

name: Agentage Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Agentage Sync 0.2.3** — sync your Obsidian vault to your Agentage Memory.

### Install (manual)
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into
your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/agentage-memory/` folder, then enable
**Agentage Sync** under Settings → Community plugins.

### Install (BRAT)
Add `agentage/obsidian-sync` in the BRAT plugin.

See the [README](https://github.com/agentage/obsidian-sync#readme) for setup and privacy details.
